title: Sorting by Groups
instruction: Complete the sentences about grouping items.
passage: There are 10 chocolates: 5 are ___, 3 are dark, and 2 are white. Half of the chocolates are milk. 3 out of 10 is the same as ___%. 2 out of 10 is the same as ___%. The ___ common type is milk. The ___ common type is white.
